text.title: Earned Value Management Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the earned-value-management methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; the final rule defines when to skip this methodology entirely.

rule.statement: EV measurement method per package MUST be fixed BEFORE work starts; mid-project changes invalidate trend.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: EV MUST be computed from measurement method × budget — never set equal to AC ('we spent it so we earned it').
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: SPI < 0.9 or CPI < 0.9 MUST trigger variance analysis + corrective action plan.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: EAC formula choice (CPI-only, CPI×SPI, regression) MUST cite reasoning per report.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: AC MUST come from authoritative finance system — never PM-maintained spreadsheet.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Skip for agile delivery, no AC feed, or projects <$100k.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.
